magicLink.subject: Your sign-in code
magicLink.html:
Sign in

Enter this code in the app to sign in:

{{ .Token }}

Or use this link: {{ .ConfirmationURL }}

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

confirmation.subject: Your sign-up code
confirmation.html:
Confirm your sign-up

Enter this code in the app to confirm your account:

{{ .Token }}

Or use this link: {{ .ConfirmationURL }}

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

recovery.subject: Your password reset code
recovery.html:
Reset your password

Enter this code in the app to reset your password:

{{ .Token }}

Or use this link: {{ .ConfirmationURL }}

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
